arts.ttl: Sunderland and Portsmouth in final negotiations for loan deal – Player keen on Stadium of Light exit
arts.sum: Sunderland are set to sign youngster Adil Aouchiche on loan to Portsmouth until the end of the season. That’s according to Foot Mercato, who report that the 22-year-old midfielder is set to move to the Championship strugglers in search of regular playing time.
